title: Vanilli | Just Better.
description: Vanilla + Modpack is carefully curated to enhance your gameplay with numerous quality of life features
body:
![bild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/410f230eb0273639d0901eb984220e9e2165574e.png)
# Welcome to Vanilli – The Vanilla+ Modpack!

**Vanilli** is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience while staying true to the essence of vanilla gameplay. Packed with quality-of-life improvements and subtle realism enhancements, this modpack ensures smoother, more immersive adventures.

 
 
## Features:

● **Quality of Life Improvements:** Simplified inventory, faster crafting, and streamlined   resource management.

● **Realistic Enhancements:** Dynamic lighting, environmental effects, and immersive sound design. 

● **Expanded Crafting:** Discover new recipes to fuel creativity and efficiency.

● **Performance Optimized:** Enjoy lag-free exploration with optimized performance.

● **Community-Inspired:** Developed with feedback from players to meet your needs.

Take your Minecraft adventures to the next level with Vanilli. Whether you're a seasoned player or new to the game, this modpack guarantees an unforgettable experience. Download now and explore Minecraft like never before!




## 

 ✔️ Full parity with Curseforge Version
 
 ✔️ [130+ Mods](https://www.modpackindex.com/modpack/79102/vanilli-just-better)

 ✔️ Resourcepack Tweaks

 ✔️ Performance
